vibe: Ecological anarchistic, minimalist, professional, Vinted-style simplicity

layout.spacing: Generous. Use p-8, p-12, gap-8, gap-12. No cramped containers.
layout.border_radius: rounded-none or max rounded-sm (2px to 4px) to keep the industrial edge
layout.card_style: Cardless design. Use raw divs with border-b or 1px border-border/40, high-quality images, and generous padding.

components_instructions.buttons: Flat, sharp edges (rounded-none). Dark charcoal for primary. Use translate-y hover effects.
components_instructions.inputs: Shadcn inputs customized to have sharp edges, 1px border, bg-transparent or pure white, focus-visible:ring-primary focus-visible:ring-1.
components_instructions.badges: Flat color backgrounds, stark contrasting text, 1px solid border matching the status color.
components_instructions.navigation: Sticky top bar, glassmorphism disabled. Solid off-white bg with bottom border. Minimal links, distinct login/register CTA.
components_instructions.wizard: 9 steps. Use a horizontal progress bar at the top. 1 question/section per view if possible, simple Next/Back buttons.
components_instructions.filter_drawer: On mobile, use Shadcn Sheet (drawer) triggered by a 'Filters' button. On desktop, sticky left sidebar.
components_instructions.animations: Subtle hover micro-animations: -translate-y-1, opacity transitions. Avoid heavy 3D or parallax.

testing.data_testid: MANDATORY on all interactive elements (buttons, inputs, links, badges) using kebab-case role-based names (e.g., data-testid='catalog-filter-button').

logo.description: In Limbo Logo (Black wordmark with cut-off glyphs)

hero_backgrounds.description: Minimalist architectural raw materials in off-white/grey
Abstract eco-texture, pressed paper and raw fibers

instructions_to_main_agent: Build standard React components using .js/.jsx extensions.
Do not use generic UI cards. Adopt a 'Vinted' style catalog minimalism—images taking full width of grid cell, title and price underneath with lots of whitespace.
Implement the 9-step wizard with standard Shadcn Form primitives but restyle them sharply without rounded corners to fit the brutalist/industrial theme.
Use Phosphor icons via @phosphor-icons/react for clean, line-based iconography.
Adhere exactly to the specific Dutch language naming (Beschikbaar, In afwachting, Herbestemd, In magazijn) and color mapping for badges.
Maintain strict accessibility (WCAG 2.1 AA). Colors provided above already meet contrast ratios for dark text on light backgrounds.
